final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial photo, lifestyle family portrait
Primary request: warm family reunion dinner scene with hotpot, family members toasting and laughing together
Scene/backdrop: cozy Chinese dining room with round table, walls covered with family photos and memories
Subject: multi-generational Chinese family gathered around a hotpot, smiling faces, raised glasses in celebration
Style/medium: documentary-style photography, warm lifestyle editorial
Composition/framing: medium-wide shot capturing the full round table and family members, eye-level perspective
Lighting/mood: warm yellow ambient lighting from overhead lamp, steam rising from hotpot creating soft atmosphere, cozy and joyful mood
Color palette: warm yellow and amber tones, rich browns of wooden furniture, vibrant reds and greens from hotpot ingredients
Materials/textures: glossy ceramic hotpot, wooden round table surface, soft fabric clothing, steam wisps, matte photo prints on wall
Constraints: keep the authentic Chinese family atmosphere, ensure hotpot steam is visible, family photos on wall should be recognizable as prints
Avoid: cold sterile lighting, plastic-looking food, overly posed expressions, watermark, deformed hands
